Name: Italian Chicken Marinade
Description: This Italian dressing chicken marinade is a super simple but delicious way to add flavor before grilling.

Name: Chicken Marsala
Description: Chicken Marsala is an Italian-style recipe for tender pan-fried chicken breasts in a sweet Marsala wine and mushroom sauce.

Name: Hearty Vegetable Lasagna
Description: This hearty, vegetable lasagna is the only lasagna my husband will eat. We love it!

Name: Cheesy Vegetable Lasagna
Description: A rich, cheesy lasagna loaded with vegetables.

Name: Pasta Salad
Description: This pasta salad recipe was given to me by a dear friend many years ago, and I've been making it ever since!

Name: Italian Wedding Soup
Description: This lovely Italian wedding soup recipe combines flavorful meatballs with sliced escarole, orzo pasta, and finely chopped carrot.

Name: Vegetarian Refried Beans
Description: Traditional vegetarian and vegan refried beans that taste great with hardly any fat!

Name: Sweet and Spicy Sausage and Pepper Pasta
Description: This is a fabulous meal prep recipe, and the tomatoes and peppers lend a natural sweetness.

Name: Creamy Gochujang Tortellini
Description: The popular miso pasta gets a spicy, yet savory addition of gochujang sauce.

Name: Shrimp Egg Foo Young
Description: This egg foo young recipe includes a delicious sauce to put on top of the patties.

Name: Congee
Description: Congee, a Chinese rice porridge, will make any cold winter's day warm and welcoming.

Name: Haluski - Cabbage and Noodles
Description: This haluski recipe is made with buttery egg noodles, fried cabbage, and onions.

Name: Chicken Teriyaki and Noodles
Description: Ditch the take out with this quick chicken teriyaki and noodle dish made with homemade teriyaki sauce!

Name: Kulfi
Description: This is a simple but delicious recipe for Kulfi (Indian Ice Cream).

Name: Crispy Vegetable Pakoras
Description: These vegetable pakoras are delicious. Serve with chili sauce, mint yogurt sauce, or sweet and sour sauce.

Name: Vegetarian Korma
Description: This vegetable korma recipe is an easy vegetarian curry. It's rich, creamy, mildly spiced, and extremely flavorful.

Name: Tandoori Chicken
Description: Try this authentic tandoori chicken that's marinated in yogurt and spices, then cooked on the grill.

Name: Indian Chicken Tikka Masala
Description: This Indian chicken tikka masala is an easy but flavorful version of everyone's favorite mild-medium curry!
